mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: hepatosplenomegaly, neurological symptoms (restlessness, aggression, hyperactivity, lethargy, excessive daytime somnolence, syncope, tremors)
facial paralysis, taste disturbance, salivary gland dysfunction (tongue abnormality), vesicular rash (purpura), hearing loss (vertigo)
renal involvement (infection susceptibility, proteinuria), angiokeratoma cutaneum, neuropathic pain (myalgias, allodynia), cardiac issues (syncope, arrhythmias)
recurrent fevers, myoclonic seizures (absences, generalized tonic-clonics), developmental delays, hypotonia, ataxia
self-mutilation behaviors, hemolytic anemia, mental retardation, spastic quadriparesis, choreoathetosis
progressive neurodegeneration (cognitive decline, motor regression), splenomegaly, liver cirrhosis, pulmonary arterial hypertension
peripheral polyneuropathy, cataracts, anosmia, ataxia, deafness
demyelination, irritability, feeding difficulties, poor head control, delayed milestones
muscular weakness, heart failure, coarse facies, hepatosplenomegaly, respiratory distress
